task_completion.description: Create a new watchlist named 'Core Holdings'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab, dropdown menu, or window header in the JStock application clearly displaying the new watchlist name 'Core Holdings'.

task_completion.description: Add Apple (AAPL) to the 'Core Holdings' watchlist
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock ticker 'AAPL' (Apple) is visible as an entry in the data grid or list specifically under the 'Core Holdings' watchlist.

task_completion.description: Add Microsoft (MSFT) to the 'Core Holdings' watchlist
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock ticker 'MSFT' (Microsoft) is visible as an entry in the data grid or list specifically under the 'Core Holdings' watchlist.

task_completion.description: Ensure GOOGL, AMZN, and NVDA remain in 'My Watchlist'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The stock tickers 'GOOGL', 'AMZN', and 'NVDA' are visible in the data grid or list when 'My Watchlist' is selected.

task_completion.description: Ensure AAPL and MSFT are removed from 'My Watchlist'
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'My Watchlist' is selected, the stock tickers 'AAPL' and 'MSFT' are no longer visible in the list of stocks.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the JStock graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands to modify backend files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JStock application window being actively used (e.g., clicking menus, typing in search bars, managing tabs) rather than a terminal window executing scripts or file modifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or spreadsheet to fake the watchlist creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is clearly the JStock application with its specific icons, stock data columns (like Price, Change, etc.), and layout, not a generic text editor (like gedit) or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: The stocks were added as genuine application entities, not just typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added stocks (AAPL, MSFT) populate with standard JStock columns (e.g., stock name, current price, volume) indicating they were properly searched and added via the app's database, rather than just being renamed dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target watchlist name: 'Core Holdings'. Source watchlist name: 'My Watchlist'. Stocks that must be moved to 'Core Holdings': AAPL, MSFT. Stocks that must remain in 'My Watchlist': GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA. AAPL and MSFT must be completely removed from 'My Watchlist'.
